stemHtml: What is true regarding REM and non-REM sleep?

options.a: Non-REM sleep has an increased skeletal muscle activity and is for brain functions restoration.
options.b: REM and non-REM periods are alternated and have the same length.
options.c: Non-REM sleep is to recover the body and REM sleep is to refresh the brain.
options.d: REM sleep is crucial for physical restoration.
